case_title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. JANICE MERCURIO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE NOT SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM AND PLAINTIFF CONFER IN DEPT. 502B, FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. JUDGE PRO TEM UNABLE TO MEET WITH DEFENDANT WHO ARRIVES LATE AND LEAVES CONFERENCE EARLY. THE TRIAL DATE OF MAY-27-2014 REMAINS ON CALENDAR. (D501/JPT)
ORDER RE: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY PROPERTY GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1686 HAIGHT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2014 01:30 PM FOR DEPT 501

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-18-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JANICE MERCURIO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JANICE MERCURIO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 5
Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D502B)
Appearances:
Plaintiff is present through company representative, Daniel Bornstein, Esq.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein is also present as counsel for the plaintiff.
Defendant Janice Mercurio, In Pro Per is present.

The Judge Pro Tem and plaintiff confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. The Judge Pro Tem was unable to meet with defendant who arrived late and left early. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAY-27-2014 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
